untranslatable_reason: Cash Flow to Price (C/P) ratio is not available in the allowed indicators list. The strategy requires fundamental data (cash flow per share / price) which is not present in the technical indicator set. Allowed indicators are limited to price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, volume, position, z-score, and bar properties.
translation_notes: The signal is based on fundamental value screening using C/P ratio thresholds (0.172 for value stocks, 0.059 for glamour exclusion, with a 3.0x multiple parameter). Without access to cash flow data, this rule cannot be implemented in a technical-only backtest engine. Implementation requires a fundamental data provider that supplies operating cash flow or free cash flow per share.
